purpose: Record the Forum/Index routing and context-envelope behavior for the ninth-wave bio/medicine/robotics source-federation and hard-problem package.

forum_route.prompt_summary: Ninth-wave Project Telos source federation and hard-problem research package across Gather, Index, Forum, Crucible, Telos, Learn, BuildLang/buildc, and scientific domains.

broad_focus_probe.focus: ninth-wave source federation hard-problem registry research publishing proof packets Gather Index Forum Crucible Telos Learn BuildLang buildc color calibration

telos_context.role_summary: Gather ingests provenance receipts; Index maps source refs and context; Forum routes work; Crucible verifies claims; Telos joins packets, receipts, admissions, and spans.

boundary: This receipt records routing and context-envelope behavior only. It does not prove domain-science claims or solve frontier problems.
